refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns TRUE if two n-D float precision bounding boxes (GIDX) intersect each other.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: The &&& operator returns TRUE if two n-D bounding boxes A and B intersect each other, using float precision. This means that if A (or B) is a (double precision) box3d, it will be internally converted to a float precision 3D bounding box (GIDX)

note.para: This operator is intended to be used internally by BRIN indexes, more than by users.

refsection.para: Availability: 2.3.0 support for Block Range INdexes (BRIN) was introduced.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting:
SELECT ST_3DMakeBox(ST_MakePoint(0,0,0), ST_MakePoint(2,2,2)) &&& ST_3DMakeBox(ST_MakePoint(1,1,1), ST_MakePoint(3,3,3)) AS overlaps;
overlaps ---------- t (1 row)
